trends.message: Minimum 2 assessments needed for trend analysis

alerts.title: Privileged Container
alerts.description: Container kube-proxy in kube-proxy runs privileged
alerts.remediation: Remove privileged flag, use specific capabilities

alerts.title: Host PID Namespace
alerts.description: Daemonset kubecost-prometheus-node-exporter uses host PID namespace

alerts.title: Host Network Usage
alerts.remediation: Remove hostNetwork: true unless absolutely required

alerts.title: Container Running as Root
alerts.description: Container provider-azure-installer in aks-secrets-store-provider-azure runs as root

alerts.title: RBAC Security Issue
alerts.description: Cluster binding to all authenticated users

control_details.title: Ensure API server audit log path is set
control_details.description: Enable audit logging for API server activities
control_details.remediation_plan: Configure audit logging in API server

control_details.title: Minimize the admission of privileged containers
control_details.description: Prevent containers from running in privileged mode
control_details.remediation_plan: Implement admission control for privileged containers

control_details.title: Ensure RBAC is enabled
control_details.description: Verify Role-Based Access Control is properly configured

control_details.title: Physical devices and systems within the organization are inventoried
control_details.description: Maintain accurate inventory of all physical devices and systems

control_details.title: Identities and credentials are issued, managed, verified, revoked, and audited
control_details.description: Implement comprehensive identity and access management
